description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized pickup truck with a four-door cab and an open cargo bed at the rear. The body is primarily painted in a light gray color, with black trim elements visible around the windows, wheel arches, and cargo bed. The front features a prominent grille and headlight assembly, while the rear includes a tailgate and rear lights. The wheels are robust and designed for both urban and light off-road use, with visible wheel wells and side steps for easier entry. The windows are tinted, and side mirrors are mounted on both front doors. The overall design is utilitarian yet refined, suitable for both personal and light commercial use in urban environments.
description: A light gray, four-door pickup truck with a black-trimmed open cargo bed and robust wheels, designed for urban and light utility use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, tailgate, and rear lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door cab, side steps, and full length of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the grille, headlights, and front bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, doors, and cargo bed.
